Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class AccountAssetBuyingPower

java.lang.Object

    The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request.

    equals(Object o)
     
    int
    hashCode()
     
    Optional<Boolean>
    isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed()
    The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount>
    smaAmount()
    The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request.

  • Constructor Details

    • AccountAssetBuyingPower

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerBuyingPowerAmount> buyingPowerAmount, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount, Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount> smaAmount)

    • AccountAssetBuyingPower

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower()

  • Method Details

    • buyingPowerAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AssetBuyingPowerBuyingPowerAmount> buyingPowerAmount()
      The buying_power in USD returned from the request.

    • dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount()
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed()
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • smaAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount> smaAmount()
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.

    • builder

      public static AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder builder()

    • withBuyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withBuyingPowerAmount(AssetBuyingPowerBuyingPowerAmount buyingPowerAmount)
      The buying_power in USD returned from the request.

    • withBuyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withBuyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerBuyingPowerAmount> buyingPowerAmount)
      The buying_power in USD returned from the request.

    • withDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • withDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • withIsDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withIsDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(boolean isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • withIsDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withIsDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • withSmaAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withSmaAmount(AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount smaAmount)
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.

    • withSmaAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower withSmaAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount> smaAmount)
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.
